# ODI: Pre-Submission Checklist

Run this checklist before finalizing any job map. Every item must pass.

## Core job statement
- [ ] Single functional job — no "while" or "and" linking two objectives
- [ ] Solution-free and stable for 10+ years
- [ ] Uses goal framing ("Ensure/Protect/Produce"), not responsibility framing ("Manage/Oversee")
- [ ] Boundary rules documented: Owns / Does not own / Boundary test
- [ ] If job resulted from a merge, breadth checked — outcome clusters are connected, not disconnected

## Job validation (Core Jobs and Domains)
- [ ] Passes universality test (every executor in segment has this job)
- [ ] Passes mutual exclusivity test (no activity overlap with other jobs)
- [ ] Passes data support test (APQC L2 mapping + 3 independent sources)
- [ ] Passes ends-vs-means test — candidate set decomposes by end-states, not activities (see `odi-ends-vs-means.md`)
- [ ] Excluded candidates documented with failure reason and resolution
- [ ] Blurred boundary intersections flagged as high-priority in territory matrix

## Outcome statements
- [ ] Every outcome passes the solution-free test (survives a complete solution change)
- [ ] Every outcome measures a metric of success, not a task or activity
- [ ] No outcome contains contextual constraints that belong in Evidence
- [ ] No two outcomes across different steps would be scored identically by a respondent for the same reason (MECE)
- [ ] Every outcome is placed in the correct step per step boundary definitions
- [ ] Conclude step evaluates job success, not downstream handoff

## Executor
- [ ] All outcomes describe the experience of the same executor
- [ ] Emotional and social jobs are documented

## Scoring
- [ ] 1–10 scale used (not 1–5)
- [ ] Analyst-assigned scores labeled as hypotheses
- [ ] Satisfaction scores show reasonable variance (<60% sharing the same score)
- [ ] Each score cites at least one data point
- [ ] No single source provides >50% of segment-specific evidence across all outcomes
